commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix pivoting-agent lint: put search_skills/list_skills on same line as "do not"

The lint test checks per-line for search_skills()/list_skills() references
and only exempts lines containing "do not" or "never call". The prohibition
was split across two lines, so the line with the function names didn't match.

commit.message:
Fix orchestrator: always run host discovery on shell access, including DCs

The orchestrator previously routed DCs exclusively to ad-discovery,
skipping host-level enumeration entirely. This missed additional NICs
(critical for pivoting), Hyper-V infrastructure, scheduled tasks with
stored creds, and local privilege escalation vectors.

Now: host discovery (windows-discovery/linux-discovery) runs on ALL
hosts when shell access is gained. On DCs, ad-discovery runs additionally
after host discovery completes. Sequential, not either/or.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Dashboard: only show active agents, auto-remove completed

Add agent browser, double-tap dismiss, and operator approval rule

Dashboard:
- Add agent browser (b key) — lists all agent transcripts from the
  session sorted by recency, with skill/agent-type labels extracted
  from JSONL content. Agents already in the dashboard shown with ●
  marker. Enter to add, Esc/b to close.
- Double-tap dismiss (d key) — first press shows "tap d again to
  dismiss" warning in yellow, second press within 2s actually removes
  the pane. Prevents accidental dismissals.
- Fix tasks directory path derivation in dashboard.sh — sed was
  stripping a leading dash that the actual directory keeps.
- Label extraction: detect Plan/Explore agents from prompt keywords,
  extract skill names from "Load skill" patterns, fall back to prompt
  summary instead of hex agent IDs.

Orchestrator:
- Add mandatory operator approval rule before every agent spawn.
  Presented as a top-level constraint alongside "don't run scanning
  tools". No agents launch without explicit operator sign-off.

commit.message:
feat(data-access): add bulk entitlement query with organization embedding (#1402)

## Summary

Adds `allByProductCodeWithOrganization(productCode)` to
`EntitlementCollection` — a new method that uses **PostgREST resource
embedding** to fetch entitlements JOINed with their parent organization
data in a **single HTTP request**.

### Problem

The auth-service's `getAllLlmoEnabledOrgs` function (used for the
`/auth/orgs2` admin endpoint) currently:

1. Calls `Organization.all()` — 1 query returning ~928 organizations
2. For **each** org, calls `TierClient.checkValidEntitlement()` which
makes a separate HTTP request to the PostgREST data service to query the
`entitlements` table
3. All ~928 requests fire in parallel via `Promise.all`, overwhelming
the PostgREST server behind the ALB

This causes intermittent `TypeError: fetch failed` errors in production
(observed at `2026-03-04T03:03:26 UTC` affecting 50+ organizations in a
single invocation):

```
Base Collection Error [entitlement] DataAccessError2: Failed to query
  cause: { message: 'TypeError: fetch failed' }
```

### Solution

Uses PostgREST's [resource
embedding](https://postgrest.org/en/stable/references/api/resource_embedding.html)
feature (leveraging the existing FK `entitlements.organization_id →
organizations.id`) to replace ~929 HTTP requests with **1**:

```javascript
this.postgrestService
  .from('entitlements')
  .select('id, product_code, tier, organization_id, organizations!inner(id, name, ims_org_id)')
  .eq('product_code', productCode)
  .not('organizations.ims_org_id', 'is', null)
  .range(offset, offset + DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE - 1);
```

### Key design decisions

- **`organizations!inner`** — INNER JOIN so entitlements without a
matching org are excluded
- **Filters `ims_org_id IS NOT NULL`** at the DB level to reduce data
transfer
- **Paginates** with `range()` in a loop (page size 1000) to handle
growth beyond the current ~928 orgs
- **Returns plain objects** (not model instances) with camelCase field
names — the consumer (`getAllLlmoEnabledOrgs`) only needs `id`,
`productCode`, `tier`, `name`, `imsOrgId`
- **No SQL migrations needed** — PostgREST auto-detects the existing FK
for embedding

### Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/models/entitlement/entitlement.collection.js` | Add
`allByProductCodeWithOrganization()` method |
| `src/models/entitlement/index.d.ts` | Add
`EntitlementWithOrganization` interface and method type |
| `test/unit/models/entitlement/entitlement.collection.test.js` | 6 unit
tests: happy path, empty results, missing productCode, null org, error
handling, pagination |
| `test/it/entitlement/entitlement.test.js` | 4 integration tests: LLMO
query, product code filtering, org data correctness, empty result |

### Performance impact

| Metric | Before | After |
|--------|--------|-------|
| HTTP requests to PostgREST | ~929 | 1 |
| Concurrent connections | ~928 | 1 |
| DB queries | ~929 separate SELECTs | 1 SELECT with JOIN |

## Test plan

- [x] Unit tests pass (6 new tests)
- [x] Integration tests added (4 new tests — run in CI with
docker-compose)
- [ ] After release: bump dep in auth-service and update
`getAllLlmoEnabledOrgs` to use new method
- [ ] Deploy to staging, hit `/auth/orgs2` as admin, verify single query
in CloudWatch logs
- [ ] Verify no `[entitlement] Failed to query` errors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add max_time_minutes wall-clock timeout, raise max_turns, fix audit bugs

Add max_time_minutes (default 15) as a pipeline-enforced wall-clock timeout
via subprocess timeout — meaningful for Max plan users where dollar budgets
are irrelevant. Raise default max_turns from 20 to 30 so Claude has enough
room to work on large codebases. Tiered round limits: heavy rounds (audit,
refactor, security) get 40 turns / 20 min; medium rounds 30 / 15; light
rounds 20 / 10.

Bug fixes from audit:
- Global max_budget_usd from pipeline.yaml was loaded but never applied
- Reviewer diff truncation was silent (now adds marker)
- _cleanup.current_round not cleared on Claude failure path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(shimmer): LTR direction and 1s delay to suppress flash on fast loads :nail_care:

NN/g skeleton screen research flags two issues: top-to-bottom shimmer
doesn't match LTR convention, and sub-1s loads shouldn't flash animation.

- Revert keyframes and gradients to left-to-right sweep (90deg)
- Add 1s animation-delay with backwards fill so images that load quickly
  never see motion — the static placeholder suffices
- Promote shimmer-bg to ::before pseudo-element with opacity fade-out
- Add inline script to mark images .loaded on complete/load/error

Optimize accumulation loop with pixel-major layout

for stride-1 cache access in both accumulation and argmax. Merge the
redundant weight-sum loop into the main accumulation pass.

- prompt.txt atualizado com todas as mudanças

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Frontend quality pass: shared chart helpers, bug fixes, UX improvements

- Extract buildPath/chartSeries/splitChart to lib/chartHelpers.ts,
  eliminating duplication between TrendPanel and SkuDetailPanel
- Fix Next.js 15 async params in /skus/[sku_id]/page.tsx
- Fix Math.max(...[]) returning -Infinity in ReorderPanel when empty
- Fix silent trend fetch error swallowed in SkuDetailPanel
- Add chart loading skeleton to TrendPanel (replaces plain text)
- Add empty state messages to all three AnomalyPanel sections
- Fix null window_days display in AnomalyPanel
- Disable CopilotPanel input + button during loading; clear hardcoded
  default question; replace 11-level ternary chain with lookup object

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: erp-agent-copilot
repository.description: Agentic ERP/WMS copilot with synthetic enterprise data, ML risk forecasting, and interactive stock trend predictions.

commit.message:
Fix ESC key in editor and restore assignee dropdown users

1. ESC handler was broken because obj-edit-popover doesn't exist in HTML,
   causing the null?.hidden check to always short-circuit.
2. Assignee dropdown only showed current user because allUsers population
   from comment authors was lost when initNotifications switched to mentions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: PMT
repository.description: PMT App

commit.message:
Unify all add actions into single modal with compact nav

- Merged Add Content, Smart Add, and Ask AI into one "Add" button/modal
- Single textarea: short topics use smart-add, sentences use ask-ai, attachments use research
- Collapsible URL/file section via <details> element
- Slimmed nav bar: h-12, smaller buttons, compact token cost display
- Removed duplicate openResearchModal references from empty state and footer
- Removed standalone Ask AI modal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial release: GridPane MCP server v0.1.0

MCP server for the GridPane hosting platform API.
Manage WordPress servers and sites through Claude, Cursor,
or any MCP-compatible client.

Tools: list/search/manage servers and sites, SSL, caching,
PHP versions, backups, SSO, service restarts.
